commands.review_summary:
The PR updates model status auth health and `--check` to use effective auth profile order and in-use provider auth while keeping stale profiles visible in output.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows `models status --check` fails from every OAuth/token profile in `authHealth.profiles`, while the documented auth-order contract excludes omitted profiles from active probing.
